rationale: Educ. Code §29.301 defines terms related to special education communication modes (ASL, English, unique communication mode). It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
Sec. 29.301. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Admission, review, and dismissal committee" means the committee required by the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (20 U.S.C. Section 1400 et seq.) for any student needing special education.
_note: No conflict. Rule text concerns special education definitions; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap in subject matter.
